TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Sagaran ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Santimon go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 195 buwan, 698 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 95% kyan ku 662 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 5% kyan ku 36 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 89%, Rukay 2%, Bunun 1%, Amis 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Sagaran hya' ga Valjulu. tay mkyahu' na Sagaran hya' ga Tjailjaking. tay 'llaw na Sagaran hya' ga Tjukuvulj. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč s~…ēa…£aran …£a nija mki s~…ēku ńßeto keŇč atu s~…ēantimon …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a *** ő≤uwan, *** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a *% kjan ku ** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, pajwan **%, rukaj *%, ő≤unun *%, amis~…ē *%, ő≤inańß lińßujan s~…ē Ēuli *%. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj mkraja Ē na s~…ēa…£aran ńßja Ē …£a *aljulu. taj mkjańßu Ē na s~…ēa…£aran ńßja Ē …£a tjailjakiŇč. taj Ēllaw na s~…ēa…£aran ńßja Ē …£a tjuku*ulj. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
S.FORM: alang Sagaran ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Santimon go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 195 buwan, 698 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 95% kyan ku 662 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 5% kyan ku 36 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 89%, Rukay 2%, Bunun 1%, Amis 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Sagaran hya' ga Valjulu. tay mkyahu' na Sagaran hya' ga Tjailjaking. tay 'llaw na Sagaran hya' ga Tjukuvulj. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč s~…ēa…£aran …£a nija mki s~…ēku ńßeto keŇč atu s~…ēantimon …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a *** ő≤uwan, *** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a *% kjan ku ** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, pajwan **%, rukaj *%, ő≤unun *%, amis~…ē *%, ő≤inańß lińßujan s~…ē Ēuli *%. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj mkraja Ē na s~…ēa…£aran ńßja Ē …£a *aljulu. taj mkjańßu Ē na s~…ēa…£aran ńßja Ē …£a tjailjakiŇč. taj Ēllaw na s~…ēa…£aran ńßja Ē …£a tjuku*ulj. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
